creator: djo@pasteur.fr
text:
The pnp4nagios 0.6.x branch is out and stable for a quite long time now.
I was wondering if there is some work (and I'll be glad to contribute) to bump the version of the current port or to create a new one with the official name of the project (pnp4nagios)

How-To-Repeat: Look at http://docs.pnp4nagios.org/pnp-0.6/dwnld
